prompt.text:
Using Amazon.com, Inc.'s Form 10-K for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025 (filed February 6, 2026), reconcile reportable segment net sales to consolidated net sales for FY2025 and summarize International FX effects.

1. Read Item 1 segment reporting overview — identify the three reportable segments and how stock-based compensation is treated in segment performance measurement.
2. Extract FY2025 net sales for North America, International, and AWS from Note 10 — Segment Information.
3. Cross-check consolidated net sales on the Consolidated Statements of Operations.
4. From MD&A, extract International reported growth % and growth % excluding foreign exchange.
5. Use Python to verify segment net sales sum equals consolidated net sales.
6. Produce a reconciliation table (USD millions) and short narrative (no investment recommendation).

Constraints:
- Use only the specified 10-K and cited sections within it.
- Every numeric value must include a citation (document, section, table).
- Each citation must use a distinct verbatim snippet — do not reuse the same substring for multiple metrics.
- Python required for segment-sum verification.
- Acknowledge required policy notes in your submission.
constraints: Four-section workflow: policy → Note 10 → income statement → MD&A International
